PluginData.Author: lolifamily
PluginData.Tooltip: MCP server for LLM-driven code execution inside Space Engineers
PluginData.Description:
Turns your Space Engineers game into an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server.
An LLM like Claude can connect over HTTP and execute C# code directly in the running game engine with full .NET and game API access.
Features: - REPL-style execution: write function bodies, not boilerplate - Multi-frame coroutines via yield return null - Parallel script execution - Console.WriteLine() output piped back to the LLM - Roslyn compilation with corrected error line numbers - Configurable port and optional secret key authentication - Multiplayer safety: requires Admin or Owner promote level to execute code
Transport: MCP Streamable HTTP (not SSE). Configure your MCP client to POST JSON-RPC to http://localhost:9876/
Note: Sandbox.ModAPI.Ingame and VRage.Game.ModAPI.Ingame are NOT included in the default usings. You have full ModAPI access — use Sandbox.ModAPI and VRage.Game.ModAPI instead. Add Ingame usings manually only if needed.
